name: Mexican Lasagne
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground beef with onions and green peppers.
2. Combine the drained beef with tomato paste, sauce, water, and seasoning. Simmer until thick and bubbly.
3. In a 33x20 cm pan, create a single layer with three tortilla shells. Pour half of the sauce evenly over it and sprinkle half of the olives and both cheeses on top. Repeat the layers.
4. Bake in an oven set to 190°C for 25-35 minutes. Then sprinkle the corn chips on top and bake for another 5-10 minutes.
Difficulty: very easy
Precision: measure ingredients
